## devbox services list

List all services and their status

### Synopsis

Show all services defined in the project with their container names, enabled state, and running status.

```
devbox services list [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  devbox services list
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for list
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -c, --config string   path to devbox.yml (default "devbox.yml")
```
